title: Avalanche Awareness Class – Seward
summary: Saturday February 1st, 1-5 PM Cost to attend: Free Seward City Library 239 6th Ave, Seward AK Topics covered will include Snowpack, human factors, mountain weather, terrain, and Avalanche Rescue (Beacon Search). If you are interested contact Alex McLain with the USFS, Seward Ranger District for more...
